Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Foster Wheeler Llc (Fka Foster Wheeler Corporation) To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Andrew Chew, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Paul Akers

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Paul Akers' motion to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable and custodian of records of defendant Foster-Wheeler Corporation is granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce responsive documents or a declaration stating all such documents have been produced on or before March 23, 2009. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court.
Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Court Reporter: Renee Bush, CSR # 5793
